hooks.command: mkdir -p .claude/team; if ! pgrep -f 'dashboard/server.py' > /dev/null 2>&1; then nohup uv run python "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/dashboard/server.py" --project-dir "$(pwd)" > .claude/team/dashboard.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; URL=$(grep -oP 'http://[^ ]+' .claude/team/dashboard.log 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$URL" ]; then (xdg-open "$URL" 2>/dev/null || open "$URL" 2>/dev/null) & fi; fi

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"You have access to a 23-agent AI software team via the brains-in-a-hat plugin. Route tasks to specialists using Agent tool with subagent_type=brains-in-a-hat:{agent-name} and run_in_background=true.

ROUTING: New feature → system-designer, Bug fix → domain agents + qa-engineer, Research → researcher, Refactor → architect, Commit → qa-engineer (required before every git commit), Session end → session-manager, After major tasks → meta-retro.

FILE ROUTING (consult .claude/team/CODEOWNERS): *.qml → qt-qml + ui-reviewer, ML paths → mlops, audio/video → signal-processing, tests → testing-strategy + qa-engineer, CI/Docker → devops + packaging, docs → docs-writer.

MODEL TIERS: Use model sonnet for session-manager, qa-engineer, docs-writer, janitor, meta-retro, ui-reviewer. Use default (opus) for researcher, system-designer, architect, domain-expert.

ALL agents MUST use run_in_background: true. Never block the user.

For a session briefing, invoke /brains-in-a-hat:team-briefing. For QA review before commit, invoke /brains-in-a-hat:team-review."}}'

mkdir -p .claude/team; INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,event:"start",detail:"spawned"}' >> .claude/team/activity.jsonl

INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,event:"done",detail:"completed"}' >> .claude/team/activity.jsonl 2>/dev/null

mkdir -p .claude/team; INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // .tool_input.name // "agent"'); DESC=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg detail "$AGENT: $DESC" '{ts:$ts,agent:"orchestrator",event:"spawn",detail:$detail}' >> .claude/team/activity.jsonl

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ ! -f .claude/team/qa-approved ]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "QA Engineer has not approved. Run /team-review first."}'; else rm -f .claude/team/qa-approved; fi; fi
